dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: There's a dangerous entity in the house trying to get to Darry.'

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Move objects in the house around to block the entity and make a path Darry can use to escape.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: If the entity gets too close, you can briefly possess them by pressing RT / RMB while looking in their direction, and make them go a different direction. They will fight your influence, though.
